finding_results.notes: Replaced interpretive/moral framing with observable consequence at each flagged beat: physical distancing after disclosure, somatic hesitation before renewed confession, and explicit trust-risk behavior via lockout enforcement text.
Added immediate behavior-constraining mechanism on-page (alarm protocol plus stated next-night lockout if check-in fails), then carried unresolved risk into the close.
Inserted an embodied disorientation beat between laughter and shower banter; regulation mismatch is shown through breath disruption and stabilizing touch before transition.
Rewrote the hesitation beat without the recurring suppression template; pressure now lands through pacing and tactile action.

summary: All four pass-scoped findings were revised in chapter_08 with minimal collateral churn: safety-valve narration was replaced by concrete consequence, the post-peak transition now carries unstable aftermath friction, the boundary arc now includes an on-page enforcement mechanism that constrains next-day behavior, and the global 'almost...instead...' template instance was removed.
